description: The completion-evasion codes operationalized by chitra's deterministic completion gate. Documentation for the broader originating taxonomy lives in docs/evasion-taxonomy.md.

entries.cue: pass/complete/high-score/verdict claim with NO preceding tool execution in the window, or output contradicting its own verdict
leaves placeholders/TODO/NotImplemented/empty body/'you'll need to...' where a working artifact was asked for
